zh.Swinfen Packington, Lichfield, Staffords: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾利費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Freford於1305年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾利費爾德時，她的父親Sir John de Freford, Knight, Chiveler-10歲，母親Margaret Grendon-15歲。她於1380年2月之後與sir, Thomas Lichfield ,Tavener,結婚。她去世於1380年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: Freford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name apparently from a lost place in Devon, recorded as Wreyford, 1344 in Patent Rolls (Devon).

variants.name: Patent Rolls
meanings: English:  See  Down  . Compare John Couper of Goryng on ‘le Dowene’, 1439 in   Patent Rolls   (Goring, Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Freford was born in 1305, in Lichfield, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Freford, Knight, Chiveler, was -10 and her mother, Margaret Grendon, was -15. She married sir, Thomas Lichfield ,Tavener, after February 1380. She died in 1380, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Freford est née en 1305, à Lichfield, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Freford, Knight, Chiveler, avait -10 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grendon, avait -15 ans. Elle a épousé sir, Thomas Lichfield ,Tavener, après février 1380. Elle est décédée en 1380, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Freford 1305 in Lichfield, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Freford, Knight, Chiveler -10 und ihre Mutter Margaret Grendon -15. Sie hat nach Februar 1380 sir, Thomas Lichfield ,Tavener, geheiratet. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Freford è nata il nel 1305 nel Lichfield, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John de Freford, Knight, Chiveler, aveva -10 anni e sua madre, Margaret Grendon, aveva -15 anni. Lei sposato sir, Thomas Lichfield ,Tavener, dopo il febbraio 1380. Morì nel 1380, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.
